No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to eradicating poverty or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to ending hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university elective (tertiary education, Target 4.3) and aims to develop 'business communication skills' and 'professional competitiveness' for employment, directly aligning with Target 4.4.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.
